_note: LT22 is an offline validator fixture for the reaction ConditionFormula surface. It is not a deployment profile or a claim that these reactions are implemented. Every formula is suppress-only; missing trigger producers, true line of sight, action provenance, effect synthesis, and execution-only cadence remain outside this fixture.

DclReactionRules.Name: Counter Tackle filter surface
DclReactionRules.ConditionFormula: reaction.sourceValid && reaction.incomingActionValid && reaction.incomingHitKnown && reaction.incomingHit && ability.weapon_strike && reaction.gridDistance == 1

DclReactionRules.Name: Riposte miss-or-defense filter surface
DclReactionRules.ConditionFormula: reaction.sourceValid && reaction.incomingActionValid && reaction.incomingHitKnown && (reaction.incomingAttackMiss || reaction.incomingDefended) && ability.weapon_strike && reaction.gridDistance == 1

DclReactionRules.Name: Rod Counter partial filter
DclReactionRules.ConditionFormula: reaction.sourceValid && reaction.incomingActionValid && !reaction.isSelfSource && a.team != t.team && t.hp > 0 && !t.status.ko && ability.direct && !a.status.invisible && targetSlot.rightweapon.category_rod && targetSlot.rightweapon.weaponRange >= reaction.gridDistance
